title: saxifraga fortunei var. fortunei
intro: Saxifraga fortunei var. fortunei, also known as Fortune's saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its roots, leaves, and stems. Fortune's saxifrage is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
